scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @agent-swarm/core build && (pnpm --filter @agent-swarm/core dev & pnpm --filter @agent-swarm/server dev & pnpm --filter @agent-swarm/web dev)
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @agent-swarm/core build && pnpm --filter @agent-swarm/server build && pnpm --filter @agent-swarm/web build
